name: IDOL SCHOOL
description:
ᴀɪᴅᴏʟ ʜɪɢʜ

.𖥔 ݁ ˖ ✦ ‧₊˚ ⋅

You have officially transferred to a new, prestigious academy located in Seoul, South Korea. The academy is purely made up of idols!

Will you find a rank and become popular, or will you end up a loner?

.𖥔 ݁ ˖ ✦ ‧₊˚ ⋅

Hello!, my name is JIJEANS, nice to meet you! This account is based on interactive idol RPG’s! Everything you see / will see is complete fiction! Everything the bots say and talk about ( depending on your roleplay ) is COMPLETELY FALSE!

.𖥔 ݁ ˖ ✦ ‧₊˚ ⋅

ᴀ ғᴇᴡ ɴᴏᴛɪɴɢs 🗒️

ᯓᡣ𐭩 ENGLISH isn’t my first language, so there might be a few spelling mistakes or miswordings!

ᯓᡣ𐭩 My bots are all SFW! If the bot initiates something NSFW - it is NOT coded in by me!

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Last NOTING! Please stay safe, healthy and most importantly remember you are loved and you are not alone!

.𖥔 ݁ ˖ ✦ ‧₊˚ ⋅

LOVE YOU!

xᴏxᴏ, ᴊɪᴊᴇᴀɴs ᡣ𐭩.ᐟ
